zh.lifeSummary: 當Lucy Grey於大約1403年出生在英國德比夏爾可德諾時，她的父親Richard Grey34歲，母親Elizabeth Basset32歲。她於1424年與Sir Rowland Lenthale在英國英格蘭德比夏爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1453年3月30日在英國史洛普爾布福德享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lucy Grey于大约1403年出生在英国德比夏爾可德諾时，她的父亲Richard Grey34岁，母亲Elizabeth Basset32岁。她于1424年与Sir Rowland Lenthale在英国英格兰德比夏爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1453年3月30日在英国史洛普爾布福德享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: Lucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Lucie, the vernacular form of Lucia . It is sometimes assumed that Lucy is a pet form of Lucinda , but there is no etymological justification for this assumption. It was in fairly widespread use in the Middle Ages, and increased greatly in popularity in the 18th century and again in the 1990s. In Ireland it serves as an Anglicized form of Irish Luíseach .

en.lifeSummary: When Lucy Grey was born about 1403, in Codnor, Derbyshire, England, her father, Richard Grey, was 34 and her mother, Elizabeth Basset, was 32. She married Sir Rowland Lenthale in 1424, in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 30 March 1453, in Burford, Shropshire, England, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lucy Grey est née environ 1403, à Codnor, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Grey, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Basset, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Rowland Lenthale en 1424, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 30 mars 1453, à Burford, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans.

Lei sposato Sir Rowland Lenthale nel 1424, nel Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 30 marzo 1453, nel Burford, Shropshire, England, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lucy Greyが約1403年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアコドノーで生まれた時，父Richard Greyは34歳，母Elizabeth Bassetは32歳であった。1424年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアでSir Rowland Lenthaleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1453年3月30日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアブルフォードで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lucy Grey(이)가 대략 1403년 영국 더비실르 코드너에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Grey(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Basset(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1424년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르에서 Sir Rowland Lenthale(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1453년 3월 30일 영국 슈럽실르 버퍼드에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lucy Grey родилась около 1403 г. в местности коднор, дирбишир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Grey было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Basset, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Rowland Lenthale в 1424 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 30 марта 1453 г. в местности бурфорд, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 51 год.
